official_sources.evidence: Stable REST v2 docs cover spot-style market/account/order endpoints; official futures product clues require endpoint-spec verification before gateway use.
LATOKEN public product material references futures, but this adapter has not pinned a stable futures API spec.

runtime_isolation: Keep LATOKEN futures clues outside the spot REST/STOMP adapter until endpoint specs, symbols and risk semantics are verified.
unsupported_runtime_reason: LATOKEN has futures product clues, but stable futures endpoint specs, auth scope, contract metadata, positions/risk and order lifecycle reconciliation are not pinned.

market_metadata: funding or settlement schedule if exposed

required_auth_and_scope: confirm whether futures uses LATOKEN v2 HMAC headers or a separate auth flow
pin read-only and trade permission scopes for futures/perpetual endpoints
add product-scoped dry-run guard before enabling writes
unsafe_to_promote_without: contract metadata and product symbol mapping
remaining_work: pin official futures API paths and auth scheme
add contract metadata and position readback specs
add product guard before any private write runtime
